## Fillings.Converters.fillingIngredient variable

Converter for [IFillingIngredient](./ts-chocolate.fillings.ifillingingredient.md)<!-- -->. Uses IIdsWithPreferred pattern for ingredient selection with validation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
fillingIngredient: Converter<IFillingIngredient>
```
